---
title: "CSV to Parquet"
date: "2025-07-05"
categories: [Rstats, talk, useR]
image: slide.jpeg
format: 
  html: default
---

Update: My useR! 2025 talk was highlighted by the organizing team as one of the most watched talks. [Delighted that the talk resonated with wider audiences](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/viswadutt_r-user-user2026-share-7447349795918131200-l8sF?utm_source=share&utm_medium=member_desktop&rcm=ACoAABKn7o8BAJav0_25gysF6-9IIA2ycdZEwF0)


Sharing slides of my useR!2025 talk, *CSV to Parquet: Managing Data for Multi-language Analytics Teams*

## Slides

[Open the slides](https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/e/2PACX-1vQpGIN2Ol9lk7GC3lIUku96-KWPFs8qzF9pd7Qf45a0y5m2SVjLKLWo8vgfxi99BvSm2_jx7wm8RqB2/pub?start=false&loop=false&delayms=3000)

<div class="responsive-embed js-embed" data-src="https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/e/2PACX-1vQpGIN2Ol9lk7GC3lIUku96-KWPFs8qzF9pd7Qf45a0y5m2SVjLKLWo8vgfxi99BvSm2_jx7wm8RqB2/pubembed?start=false&loop=false&delayms=3000" data-title="CSV to Parquet slides"></div>

## Talk

[Watch the talk on YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=TnFQOE3_H5A)

<div class="responsive-embed js-embed" data-src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/TnFQOE3_H5A" data-title="CSV to Parquet talk"></div>
